backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users) and state maps, with blob storage and authorization mixins included.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts admin user and invitation records from variant-based registrationMethod types to plain Text strings for both adminUsers and adminPrincipals maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two admin password pre-seeding features (using 'Munnu1998@' SHA-256 hashed) to their implementing frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering hooks, pages, and components for the print hub application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Nellore Print Hub', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root router configuration using TanStack Router, defining all application routes and a RootLayout component that conditionally shows a ProfileSetup dialog for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks authentication and admin status, rendering children for admins or redirecting to login/registration with appropriate UI cards for unauthenticated or unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with links to main app routes and a chat button, showing a lock indicator on the reviews tab when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll while open, and optionally displays a title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, triggering haptic feedback on selection and displaying the chosen value in a button trigger.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, fetching conversation history by email and displaying messages in a scrollable thread.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A small toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu, using the LanguageContext and triggering haptic feedback on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sticky header with logo, language toggle, share button, and admin access icon, plus a footer and bottom navigation, wrapping page content and the chat widget.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout and showing a loading spinner during authentication.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender side.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for first-time users to enter their name, email, and mobile number, saving the profile via a mutation hook with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays full details of a selected project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during the pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app URL, with bilingual label support.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by translating its children along the X-axis in response to touch gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context provider that manages the app's active language ('en' or 'te'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing toggle and set functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges, accounting for actor and identity loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook exposing a mutation that hashes a password with SHA-256 and verifies an email/password pair against the backend for admin authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that queries the backend admin user count to determine whether any admin account has been registered yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for fetching existing admin invitations and creating new ones by hashing the password and calling the backend invite method.
Provides hooks for registering the first admin principal via Internet Identity and for seeding the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides hooks for WebAuthn-based biometric login and registration, checking device support and delegating credential creation/verification to WebAuthn utilities and the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for chat functionality: sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history by customer email.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update the company logo via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate delivery fees by distance, and update delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a React Query mutation hook to submit a negotiation response for a given quotation, invalidating related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get and set the office location via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, including fetching all projects or by category, and adding, editing, or deleting a project.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a React Query hook to retrieve the file blob associated with a specific quotation by its ID.
Provides a React Query mutation hook to handle quotation responses (accept/reject/negotiate) and invalidates related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for full quotation lifecycle management: creating, fetching, adding details, approving, and retrieving overdue quotations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a React Query hook to fetch quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating counts) with a 30-second polling interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all reviews, filter reviews by rating, and add a new review via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom React hook that detects horizontal touch swipe gestures and navigates between a predefined set of pages using TanStack Router based on swipe direction and threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides two React Query hooks for fetching the current caller's user profile and saving/updating it via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines light and dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and adds utility classes for safe-area padding, scrollbar hiding, shimmer animation, and slide-up animation.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide a typed frontend interface for creating blobs from URLs or bytes, retrieving bytes or direct URLs, and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero section, a grid of four benefit cards with icons, and a commitment section, all using translated strings from the language context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard page showing quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating), an overdue alert, and quick-link cards to various admin management sections.
Admin login page supporting email/password login, biometric (WebAuthn) login, and Internet Identity login, with auto-seeding of the first admin credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration page with a form for creating a new admin account via email and password, including validation rules and redirect to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin page for managing admin users, displaying a table of existing admins and providing a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password credentials.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email, allowing admins to expand conversations and send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin form page for viewing and updating company contact information including email, phone, physical address, and Google Maps link, with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin form page for configuring delivery pricing settings (per-km rate and minimum fee in rupees), converting to/from paise for backend storage, with bilingual support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and managing the company logo, showing the current logo and allowing file selection with upload progress tracking via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects (add, edit, delete) with image upload support, category selection, and a dialog-based form UI protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing customer quotation requests, supporting adding pricing details, approving quotations, responding to negotiations, and uploading reply files.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Displays a contact page with quick-action WhatsApp and call buttons, plus email, phone, and address info cards, pulling contact details from the useGetContactInfo hook with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Shows delivery pricing info (per-km rate and minimum fee from backend config) and an interactive fee calculator where users enter a distance to get an estimated delivery cost.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section, feature highlights grid, and a services preview grid, wrapped in swipe and pull-to-refresh containers with translated content.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of the current user's quotation requests with status indicators (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) and expandable details including price, description, terms, and downloadable reply files.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Shows a filterable gallery of projects by service category, with admin ability to upload new projects via a dialog form that supports image upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Confirmation page shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID, next-steps list, and navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
Form page allowing users to submit a new quotation request by selecting a service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and an optional file attachment up to 10MB.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays the user's quotations with their admin-provided details and allows the user to accept, reject, or negotiate each quotation, including a negotiation history view.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static services listing page that presents all offered service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen printing, offset) with expandable item lists and bilingual English/Telugu labels.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: A form page that allows authenticated users to submit a customer review with name, rating, project type, review text, and an optional image upload, with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable grid of customer reviews fetched from the backend, requiring authentication to view, with pull-to-refresh support and a button to navigate to the review submission page.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire frontend application, covering navigation, pages, forms, and UI labels.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translations and provides a getTranslations helper that returns the correct translation object based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu translation strings mirroring the English translation structure, providing full localization for all UI text in the application.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module wrapping the browser Vibration API to provide haptic feedback patterns (tap, success, error, selection) with a convenience hapticFeedback function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn utility functions for biometric authentication, including support detection, credential registration, authentication, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Nellore Print Hub frontend, defining custom colors using oklch variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes with dark mode and plugin support.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for Nellore Print Hub, documenting existing features, known issues with first-user admin promotion, and pending fix requests to auto-promote the first login to admin with password Munnu1998@.
